engine: Basin OS V4.1 Full Migration Radar Runner

compliance.linkedin: No LinkedIn page scraping. Stores possible LinkedIn profile URLs from Brave public search results only.
compliance.outreach: No auto-send. Manual review required before every outreach.

routingRules.readyForAssociate: Real person + email + phone + evidence/enrichment + score >= 58.
routingRules.linkedinVerify: LinkedIn URL found but manual profile/contact verification is still needed.
routingRules.skipped: No email + phone + LinkedIn/manual verification route.
